terms.seoDesc: BioWikiPro terms of service — the QC/QA Pharma knowledge platform.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.body:
## 1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using BioWikiPro (the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part, please do not use the Service.

## 2. Description of the Service

BioWikiPro provides an in-depth QC/QA Pharma knowledge platform, including:

- A free library of GMP, Annex 1, and Microbiology lessons
- QC decision-support tools (CCS Builder, Decision Tree)
- Paid resource packs (GMP Audit Survival Kit, Career Starter Kit)
- Market-trend content and a career roadmap

## 3. User Accounts

You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure. You agree not to share your account with third parties. We may terminate accounts that violate these terms.

## 4. Payments & Purchases

All transactions are processed by Stripe — a secure international payment platform. Prices are shown in USD. Digital products (documents, toolkits) are delivered by email or direct download after successful payment.

## 5. Intellectual Property

All content on BioWikiPro — text, images, lessons, tools — is the intellectual property of BioWikiPro. You may not copy, distribute, or resell content without written permission.

## 6. Limitation of Liability

Content on BioWikiPro is for educational and reference purposes only. We are not liable for any professional decisions made based on this content. Users must follow GMP regulations and their own organization's internal guidance.

## 7. Changes to the Terms

We may update these Terms at any time. Changes take effect when posted. Continued use of the Service after changes means you accept the updated Terms.

## 8. Contact

Questions about these Terms? Contact: support@biowikipro.com

privacy.seoDesc: BioWikiPro privacy policy — how we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body:
## 1. Information We Collect

When you use BioWikiPro, we may collect:

- **Account information:** name and email address at sign-up
- **Payment information:** handled entirely by Stripe — we never store card details
- **Usage data:** pages viewed, lessons studied, tools used
- **Technical data:** IP address, browser, device (anonymized)

## 2. How We Use Information

- Provide and improve the Service
- Send order confirmations and purchased materials
- Send content updates (you can unsubscribe anytime)
- Analyze how users interact with content to improve quality

## 3. Sharing Information

We **do not sell** your personal data. We only share information with:

- **Stripe:** secure payment processing
- **Email provider:** transactional notifications
- **Authorities:** when legally required

## 4. Data Security

We apply industry-standard measures: HTTPS encryption, passwords hashed with bcrypt, and restricted internal data access. However, no system is 100% secure.

## 5. Cookies

We use session cookies to keep you signed in. We do not use third-party tracking cookies for advertising.

## 6. Your Rights

You have the right to:

- Request to view or export your personal data
- Request deletion of your account and all data
- Unsubscribe from marketing email anytime

Contact: support@biowikipro.com

## 7. Data Retention

Account data is stored on a secured PostgreSQL server. When you delete your account, data is removed within 30 days.

## 8. Contact

Questions about this Privacy Policy: support@biowikipro.com

refund.seoDesc: BioWikiPro 7-day refund policy — not satisfied, full refund, no questions asked.
refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.guaranteeBody: If you're not satisfied with any paid product within 7 days of purchase, we'll issue a full refund — no questions asked.
refund.body:
## Eligible Products

The refund policy applies to all digital products on BioWikiPro:

- GMP Audit Survival Kit ($59)
- Career Starter Kit ($15)
- Interview Prep Pack ($20)
- Career Accelerator Bundle ($30)
- Pro Subscription (first month)

## Refund Conditions

- Requests must be submitted within **7 days** of successful payment
- Each account may be refunded a maximum of **once** per product
- Accounts found abusing the refund policy may be declined

## How to Request a Refund

1. Email support@biowikipro.com
2. Subject: **[Refund] Product name**
3. Body: your account email and purchase date
4. We process within **2–3 business days**

## Refund Timing

Once approved, the refund is processed through Stripe and appears on your original payment method within **5–10 business days** (depending on your card issuer).

## Not Eligible

- Requests after 7 days from purchase
- Pro Subscription after the first month (full month used)

## Support Contact

Questions about refunds? Contact: support@biowikipro.com — we respond within 24 business hours.
